title: Big K Kiln Dried Kindling Firewood
features: For open fires and multi fuel stoves
Dry and reliable kindling that is ideal for lighting any wood or solid fuel fire.
description: Product Description Big K's kiln dried kindling wood is the ideal wood to fire up pizza ovens, woodburning ovens, multi-fuel stoves and oven fireplaces. It's extremely dry and reliable, making it kindling wood of the highest calibre. Available in handy 1.2-1.5kg bag size, Big K's kiln Dried kindling wood is the perfect way to get the fire started. Safety Warning Safety first! To avoid danger of suffocation, keep this wrapper away from babies and children Manufacturer Contact Information Unit 20 Millmead Rd Tottenham Hale London N17 9Qu See more
